dial_hist:
# User:  Hello! I'm looking for a budget-friendly hotel to stay in Cambridge, preferably in the western part of the city. It doesn't need to have free parking.

# System: "The booking reference number for your stay at Finches Bed and Breakfast is fEYOWfyP. If you need any further assistance, please let me know!"

# System: "The booking reference number for your reservation at The Gardenia is JLHbIRWM. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!"
